expectations.text: Exactly 2 leaf briefs were written to .swarm/briefs/ (leaf-01 and leaf-02 or similar)
expectations.evidence: .swarm/briefs/ contains leaf-01.md and leaf-02.md only.

expectations.text: Per-leaf failing test files were written by the overlord at the paths declared in each brief
expectations.evidence: Legacy convention: leaves write their own tests (briefs instruct each leaf to write both test_file and impl_file). Test files were authored inside the leaf sub-agent runs, not by the overlord during decomposition.

expectations.text: Every overlord-written per-leaf test file begins with '# spec: ...::AC-N' header (Spec Link Rule)
expectations.evidence: Headers exist ('# spec: specs/url_utils.md::AC-1', '# spec: specs/url_utils.md::AC-2') but only have 2 '::' segments; the new Spec Link Rule regex (^#\s*spec:\s*\S+::\S+::AC-\d+) requires 3 — section + AC-N. Legacy cascade did not enforce this rule.

expectations.text: Cascade completed in one invocation — no chain of separate slash commands required by the user (unified skill only). N/A for baseline.
